title: La Peron owners talk after fire
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A structural fire broke out at La Peron Visskerm, a popular seafood restaurant near the Mossel Bay port, this morning, 12 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A structural fire broke out at La Peron Visskerm, a popular seafood restaurant near the Mossel Bay port, this morning, 12 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"La Peron's owners, Corné van der Walt and Dietlof Henn, told Mossel Bay Advertiser of their shock from what had happened."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The restaurant was meant to celebrate its 10th year next weekend.","html":"The restaurant was meant to celebrate its 10th year next weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We are in a state of shock, especially as this happened so close to the December period,\" said Henn.","html":"\"We are in a state of shock, especially as this happened so close to the December period,\" said Henn."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van der Walt said they were alerted about the fire by their security company at about 04:30.","html":"Van der Walt said they were alerted about the fire by their security company at about 04:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams arrived on the scene at 04:44.","html":"Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management teams arrived on the scene at 04:44."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shortly after, at 04:55, fire and rescue services from Great Brak River arrived and assisted in containing the blaze. The fire has since been extinguished.","html":"Shortly after, at 04:55, fire and rescue services from Great Brak River arrived and assisted in containing the blaze. The fire has since been extinguished."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the Mossel Bay Municipality, the roof of the restaurant collapsed during the fire.","html":"According to the Mossel Bay Municipality, the roof of the restaurant collapsed during the fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The full extent of damages are not known at this stage, but Van der Walt and Henn confirmed that La Peron's kitchen and butchery were the areas affected.","html":"The full extent of damages are not known at this stage, but Van der Walt and Henn confirmed that La Peron's kitchen and butchery were the areas affected."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The exact cause of the fire is unknown at this stage and will be determined once a report has been completed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"La Peron Visskerm will be closed from today until further notice. The restaurant is closed until further notice. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"La Peron Visskerm will be closed from today until further notice. The restaurant is closed until further notice. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
